mapper.select: SELECT ec.id, ec.name, ec.pid, ec.level, ec.range, ec.is_show, ec.status, ec.sort, ec.diy_id, eca.real_name , eca.phone FROM eb_circle ec LEFT JOIN eb_circle_admin eca ON ec.id = eca.circle_id WHERE ec.is_delete = 0 and eca.is_del = 0 and eca.type = 5 order by ec.create_time desc
SELECT * FROM eb_circle WHERE is_delete = 0 AND address_switch = 1 AND is_show = 1 AND `status` = 1
